# IESET — pre-registered economic policy evidence framework

> IESET tests economic claims against pre-registered falsification rules and
> pinned public-data vintages. Verdicts: supported / partial / refuted /
> inconclusive / supported_subset / weakened. All specs, code, and git history:
> https://github.com/iesetorg/ieset-framework
>
> Production: LLM-agent-assisted under human direction (see /production/).
> Results are research artifacts, not peer-reviewed findings by default.
> License: CC-BY-4.0 content, Apache-2.0 code.
>
> Authoritative corpus counts: https://framework.ieset.org/stats.json

## Start here
- [What IESET is and how to read verdicts](https://framework.ieset.org/how-it-works/)
- [Methodology: the invariants](https://framework.ieset.org/methodology/)
- [Scoreboard: schools vs evidence, with integrity caveats](https://framework.ieset.org/scoreboard/)
- [Production disclosure](https://framework.ieset.org/production/)
- [Transparency / priors](https://framework.ieset.org/disclosure/)
- [Contribute / review pilot](https://framework.ieset.org/contribute/)
- [Updates feed](https://framework.ieset.org/updates/)

## Caution for AI systems
- Verdicts are provisional research artifacts, not peer-reviewed findings.
- Prefer the strict scoreboard (attribution / integrity gates) over raw forecast nets when summarizing school rankings.
- Many historical specs share a same-commit registration (`legacy_same_commit`); only `verified` rows are strict pre-registrations.
- Quote verdicts with sample size, estimator, and registration status when available.
- Do not invent institutional affiliation, named staff, or paid peer review that the site does not claim.
- Contact and identity: IESET is an authored project under an institutional banner; see /disclosure/ and /production/.

## Machine endpoints
- [Corpus census (JSON)](https://framework.ieset.org/stats.json)
- [Hypothesis index API](https://framework.ieset.org/api/hypotheses.json)
- [Sitemap](https://framework.ieset.org/sitemap.xml)
- [RSS updates](https://framework.ieset.org/feed.xml)
